title: AirBaking Essentials Rustic Fermenting Jar, 25 Oz (730ml), Glass, Round, Screw Top, Reusable, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Bread Fermentation Kit
features: Easy to Use & Clean: Wide-mouth round glass jar makes feeding and maintaining your sourdough starter simple. Dishwasher-safe for effortless cleaning, ideal for all levels of bread-making enthusiasts.
High-Quality & Durable: Crafted from premium glass, with airtight and wooden lids for lasting performance. Perfect for sourdough fermentation and reliable for all your bread-making needs.
Complete Starter Kit: Includes a thermometer band, date tracking band, silicone scraper, cloth cover, airtight lid, and wooden lid. This kit provides essential bread-making accessories and tools.

Versatile & Multipurpose: Ideal for maintaining sourdough starters, gluten-free dough, or fermenting kimchi, jam, or marmalade. A reusable fermenting jar that supports a variety of baking and fermenting needs.

Precise Tracking & Measurements: Graduated scale marks for accuracy, a thermometer band to monitor fermentation temperature, and a date band to track feeding times. Perfect for precise bread baking supplies.

Feedback Response: This kit is intended to provide essential tools for maintaining and feeding your starter. It does not include a dehydrated starter. We've updated the packaging to reflect this, and we hope these clarifications will ensure a better experience. If you need assistance, feel free to reach out!
description: Effortlessly Maintain Your Sourdough Starter with the Commerce Sourdough Starter Jar Kit! Designed for bread enthusiasts of all levels, this premium sourdough starter jar kit offers a comprehensive set of tools to simplify the art of fermentation and baking. Whether you’re a beginner or a seasoned baker, this kit ensures precise tracking, easy maintenance, and superior performance for your sourdough starter and other fermented creations. Easy to Use & Clean: The wide-mouth round glass jar is designed for hassle-free feeding and cleaning. It’s dishwasher-safe, making maintenance quick and effortless, perfect for bakers at any skill level. High-Quality & Durable: Made from premium, durable glass, this jar includes an airtight lid and a wooden lid for long-lasting use. Ideal for sourdough fermentation and reliable for all your bread-baking adventures. Complete Starter Kit: Comes with a thermometer band, date tracking band, silicone scraper, cloth cover, airtight lid, and wooden lid. This all-in-one set has all the essential tools you need for successful bread making. Versatile & Multipurpose: Beyond sourdough, this jar is perfect for gluten-free dough, kimchi, jam, marmalade, or other fermentation projects. A reusable jar designed to accommodate a variety of baking and fermenting needs. Precise Tracking & Measurements: Features graduated scale marks for accuracy, a thermometer band to monitor fermentation temperature, and a date band to track feeding times. Stay on top of every detail for optimal baking results. Kit Includes: A 25 oz (730 ml) glass round jar, silicone scraper, cloth cover, thermometer band, date tracking band, airtight lid, and wooden lid. Please note: This kit does not include a dehydrated sourdough starter. Why Choose the Commerce Sourdough Starter Jar Kit? This thoughtfully designed kit simplifies the sourdough maintenance process, providing everything you need to create and care for your starter. The durable materials and precise tools ensure long-lasting performance, while the versatile design supports a variety of fermentation and baking projects. Make the most of your bread-making journey with a kit built for success!
